name: Digital Profile Only
short: A mobile-first business profile with call, WhatsApp, social, website and location links.

name: Basic QR Card
short: A printed QR business card connected to your digital profile.

name: Premium NFC Card
short: Premium custom NFC card with QR backup and a branded digital profile.

name: Google Review NFC Card
short: Help genuine customers reach your Google review page with a tap or scan.

name: Instagram NFC Card
short: Open your Instagram profile instantly—ideal for creators, salons and stores.

name: WhatsApp NFC Card
short: Let customers open a WhatsApp conversation with one quick tap.

name: Shop Owner Smart Card
short: A complete smart identity card for shop owners and local businesses.

name: Google Review Stand / QR Stand
short: Counter-top NFC and QR stand for collecting genuine customer feedback.

name: Restaurant QR Menu Card
short: A contactless digital menu solution for cafés, restaurants and hotels.

name: NFC Ring
short: A modern NFC wearable for sharing your digital profile.

name: Wooden NFC Card
short: Natural wooden NFC card with custom branding and digital profile.

name: Metal NFC Card
short: Luxury metal NFC card made for an unforgettable first impression.
